odoo.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
        
            

                
                
                
                
                 | Login
                
                
                
                
            
            
                
                
                
                
                
                
                
                
                

                    

                        
                    
                    
                    
                    

                        

                            
                        
                        Create Your Account
                        
Get started with your business in seconds
                        
                        
                            
                            
                            
                            
                            
                                

                            
                            
                            

                                

                                    

                                        
                                        
                                    
                                    
This field is required
                                
                                
                                

                                    

                                        
                                        
                                    
                                    
This field is required
                                
                                
                                

                                    

                                        
                                        
                                        
                                    
                                    
This field is required
                                
                                
                                

                                    

                                        
                                        
                                        
                                    
                                    
This field is required
                                
                                
                                

                                    

                                        
                                        
                                    
                                    
This field is required
                                
                                
                                

                                    

                                        
                                        
                                        
                                            Select Country *
                                            
                                                
                                                    
                                                
                                            
                                        
                                        
                                    
                                    
This field is required
                                
                                
                                

                                    

                                        
                                            🇿🇼 +263
                                            🇿🇦 +27
                                            🇿🇲 +260
                                            🇧🇼 +267
                                            🇲🇼 +265
                                            🇲🇿 +258
                                            🇬🇧 +44
                                            🇺🇸 +1
                                        
                                        
                                        
                                    
                                    
This field is required
                                
                                
                                
                                    Create Account
                                
                                
                                

                                    Already have an account? Log In
                                
                            
                        
                    

                    
                        function validateInputs(containerId) {
                            var container = document.getElementById(containerId);
                            var inputs = container.querySelectorAll('input[required="required"]');
                            var isValid = true;
                            inputs.forEach(function(input) {
                                var errorSpan = input.parentNode.nextElementSibling;
                                if (!input.value.trim()) {
                                    input.classList.add('input-error');
                                    if (errorSpan && errorSpan.classList.contains('error-text')) {
                                        errorSpan.innerText = 'This field is required';
                                        errorSpan.style.display = 'block';
                                    }
                                    isValid = false;
                                } else {
                                    input.classList.remove('input-error');
                                    if (errorSpan && errorSpan.classList.contains('error-text')) {
                                        errorSpan.style.display = 'none';
                                    }
                                }
                            });
                            return isValid;
                        }
                        
                        function showCustomError(inputEl, msg) {
                            inputEl.classList.add('input-error');
                            var errorSpan = inputEl.parentNode.nextElementSibling;
                            if (errorSpan && errorSpan.classList.contains('error-text')) {
                                errorSpan.innerText = msg;
                                errorSpan.style.display = 'block';
                            }
                        }

                        function validateSignupForm(event, form) {
                            if(!validateInputs('signup-form-fields')) {
                                event.preventDefault();
                                return false;
                            }
                            
                            let isValid = true;
                            
                            // Name Validation
                            const nameInput = document.getElementById('full_name');
                            if (nameInput && !/^[A-Za-z\s]+$/.test(nameInput.value)) {
                                showCustomError(nameInput, "Full Name can only contain letters and spaces.");
                                isValid = false;
                            }
                            
                            // Strict Email Validation
                            const emailInput = document.getElementById('email');
                            if (emailInput) {
                                const emailVal = emailInput.value;
                                const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
                                if (emailVal.length > 254) {
                                    showCustomError(emailInput, "Email is too long.");
                                    isValid = false;
                                } else if (!emailRegex.test(emailVal)) {
                                    showCustomError(emailInput, "Please enter a valid email address (e.g. name@domain.com).");
                                    isValid = false;
                                } else {
                                    const domain = emailVal.split('@')[1];
                                    const tld = domain.split('.').pop();
                                    if (tld.length < 2) {
                                        showCustomError(emailInput, "Top-level domain must be at least 2 letters.");
                                        isValid = false;
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                            
                            // Password Validation
                            const pwInput = document.getElementById('password');
                            if (pwInput && !/^(?=.*[A-Z])(?=.*\d)(?=.*[!@#$%^&*()_+\-=\[\]{};':"\\|,.<>\/?]).{8,}$/.test(pwInput.value)) {
                                showCustomError(pwInput, "Password must be 8+ chars, with 1 uppercase, 1 number, 1 special char.");
                                isValid = false;
                            }
                            
                            if (!isValid) {
                                event.preventDefault();
                                return false;
                            }
                            
                            showSpinner(form);
                            return true;
                        }
                        
                        function validateLoginForm(event, form) {
                            if(!validateInputs('login-form-fields')) {
                                event.preventDefault();
                                return false;
                            }
                            showSpinner(form);
                            return true;
                        }
                        
                        function validateResetForm(event, form) {
                            var containerId = document.getElementById('reset-form-fields') ? 'reset-form-fields' : 'new-password-fields';
                            if(!validateInputs(containerId)) {
                                event.preventDefault();
                                return false;
                            }
                            showSpinner(form);
                            return true;
                        }
                    



                    
                        function togglePassword(icon, inputId) {
                            var input = document.getElementById(inputId);
                            if (input.type === "password") {
                                input.type = "text";
                                icon.classList.remove('fa-eye');
                                icon.classList.add('fa-eye-slash');
                            } else {
                                input.type = "password";
                                icon.classList.remove('fa-eye-slash');
                                icon.classList.add('fa-eye');
                            }
                        }

                        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
                            var phoneInput = document.getElementById('phone_number');
                            var countryCode = document.getElementById('country_code');
                            
                            if (phoneInput && countryCode) {
                                phoneInput.addEventListener('input', function(e) {
                                    if (countryCode.value === '+263') {
                                        var val = this.value.replace(/\D/g, '');
                                        if (val.length > 9) val = val.substring(0, 9);
                                        var formatted = '';
                                        if (val.length > 0) formatted += val.substring(0, 2);
                                        if (val.length > 2) formatted += ' ' + val.substring(2, 5);
                                        if (val.length > 5) formatted += ' ' + val.substring(5, 9);
                                        this.value = formatted;
                                    }
                                });
                                countryCode.addEventListener('change', function() {
                                    phoneInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('input'));
                                });
                            }
                        });
                    

                    
                    

                        
                        

                            
Our support team is ready to help.
                            
Reach out to us anytime.
                            
                            

                                
                                    
 WhatsApp: 
                                
                            
                        

                        Welcome Back
                        
                            
                            
                            
                            
                                

                            
                            
                                

                            

                            

                                

                                    

                                        
                                        
                                    
                                    
This field is required
                                
                                
                                

                                    

                                        
                                        
                                        
                                    
                                    
This field is required
                                
                            
                            
                            
                                Login
                            
                            
                            

                                New to Havano? Sign up
                                Forgot Password?
                            
                        
                    

                    
                    

                        
                            Reset Password
                            
Enter your email to receive a reset link.
                        
                        
                            New Password
                            
Enter your new password below.
                        
                        
                            Invalid Link
                            
This password reset link is invalid or expired.
                        
                        
                        
                            
                            
                            
                            
                            
                                

                            
                            
                                

                                    
                                    
Redirecting to login...
                                
                            
                            
                            
                                

                                    

                                        

                                            
                                            
                                        
                                        
This field is required
                                    
                                
                                
                                    Send Reset Link
                                
                            
                            
                            
                                

                                    

                                        

                                            
                                            
                                            
                                        
                                        
This field is required
                                    
                                    

                                        

                                            
                                            
                                            
                                        
                                        
This field is required
                                    
                                
                                
                                    Reset Password
                                
                            
                        
                        
                        
Remembered it? Back to Login
                    
                    
                    
                        // Auto-redirect to login after successful password reset
                        (function() {
                            var successMsg = document.getElementById('reset-success-msg');
                            if (successMsg) {
                                setTimeout(function() {
                                    window.location.href = '/web/login';
                                }, 2000);
                            }
                        })();
                    

                    
                        function toggleForms(target) {
                            document.getElementById('signup-form').classList.remove('active');
                            document.getElementById('login-form').classList.remove('active');
                            document.getElementById('reset-form').classList.remove('active');
                            
                            if(target === 'login') {
                                document.getElementById('login-form').classList.add('active');
                                window.history.pushState({}, '', '/web/login');
                            } else if(target === 'reset') {
                                document.getElementById('reset-form').classList.add('active');
                                window.history.pushState({}, '', '/web/reset_password');
                            } else {
                                document.getElementById('signup-form').classList.add('active');
                                window.history.pushState({}, '', '/web/signup');
                            }
                        }
                        
                        function showSpinner(form) {
                            const btn = form.querySelector('.btn-submit');
                            const textSpan = btn.querySelector('.btn-text');
                            const originalText = textSpan.innerText;
                            
                            // Prevent multiple clicks
                            btn.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
                            btn.style.opacity = '0.9';
                            
                            // Add spinner icon
                            textSpan.innerHTML = '' + originalText;
                            
                            // Form will submit normally after this
                            return true;
                        }
